---
name: Feature request / idea
about: Suggest a capability, pipeline stage, or behavior change for BCF
title: "[idea] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## What's the use case?

<!-- A concrete scenario: "I want to give BCF X and have it produce Y."
     Paste a sample mission prompt if possible. -->

## Why does BCF not already do it?

<!-- A short note on what you tried first. Sometimes the answer is
     "there's already a flag for it" — let's find out together. -->

## Shape of the change (optional)

<!-- Rough sketch: new pipeline stage? new preset? new model role?
     behavior change on an existing path? Not required but useful for
     maintainer-time estimation. -->

## Out of scope

<!-- Name one thing BCF should definitely NOT do as part of this.
     Keeps the PR focused. -->
